description: Return a list of Locations associated with a Project.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[parent_id]
parameters.description: Return location(s) with the specified parent_ids.

parameters.name: filters[code]
parameters.description: Return location(s) matching any of the specified codes in the search term.

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified search query string.

parameters.name: filters[search_with_code]
parameters.description: Return item(s) where the location code or the location name match the search term

parameters.name: filters[superlocations_for]
parameters.description: Return superlocations (ancestors) of the specified location ids.

parameters.name: filters[sublocations_for]
parameters.description: Return sublocations (descendants) of the specified location ids.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[depth_range]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) with a tree depth within the specified range.

Examples:
`0...1` - Parents and children
`0...2` - Parents, children, and grandchildren
`1...2` - Children and grandchildren

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

code.description: The unique code for this Location
